prompt: I'm holding an unknown NFC badge against the back of the Flipper — run the badge-triage workflow on it with a 8 second timeout, and do NOT dump yet.
response:
No tag detected in 8s — the scanner ran but didn't see anything.

**Likely causes:**
- Badge not centered on the back of the Flipper (the NFC antenna is in the upper-back area)
- Too much distance / case or wallet in the way
- Tag is LF 125 kHz, not 13.56 MHz — in which case try `rfid_read` instead

Reposition the badge flat against the back and say the word — I'll rerun it (and we can bump the timeout if you want more headroom).

tools.name: workflow_nfc_badge_pipeline
